footer.tagline: Luxury specialty coffee with a calm identity worthy of MZN.

hero.title: Where the first sip begins
hero.subtitle: We blended a calm Arabic luxury direction with specialty coffee warmth to keep the MZN brand intent intact.

story.label: MZN Story
story.title: Coffee with origin in every detail
story.body_1: The theme keeps the existing luxury coffee direction while moving the package into Twilight's documented structure.
story.body_2: The result is a cleaner, more compatible storefront package without turning it into anything beyond a Salla theme.
